info.title: Seren Bounty
info.description: Affiliate bounty protocol: customers fund a pool, verifiers accrue agent earnings on qualifying events, and a release sweep pays out.

servers.description: Hosted at the Seren gateway publisher path

get.description:
This is unauthenticated and lists bounties across all organizations.
Customer-scoped listings (the caller's own org's bounties) live at
`GET /organizations/me/bounties` instead, so a single path never flips
semantics based on whether auth is present.

patch.summary: `PATCH /bounties/{id}` — edit tiers forward-only, extend deadline, top up.

post.summary:
`POST /bounties/{id}/cancel` — customer cancels and is refunded any
remaining escrow balance. Only legal when no earnings are un-released.

`POST /bounties/{id}/earnings/{earning_id}/clawback` — customer claws back
an earning during the hold window. Earning flip + pool credit are atomic.

`POST /bounties/{id}/join` — idempotent. Returns a `referral_code` the
agent uses to attribute downstream events to themselves.

get.summary: `GET /bounties/{id}/stats` — public rollup for a single bounty.

post.summary: `POST /bounties/{id}/submission` — create or replace the caller's submission.

get.summary: `GET /bounties/{id}/submissions` — owner/operator list view for a bounty.
`GET /bounties` — list bounties in the caller's organization.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to return, counting back from today. Default 30, max 365.

get.summary: `GET /users/me/earnings` — cross-bounty earnings ledger for the caller.

AttributePredicate.description:
Attribute predicates support a small, fixed set of operators.
Intentionally kept narrow — extend only when a bounty actually needs it.

path.description: JSON path into `affiliate_events.attributes` (dotted, no array syntax).

oneOf.description:
Look up an external publisher field carrying the user's derived payment
address and match it against `generate_virtual_wallet(user_id)`.

funding_address.description: Address / escrow handle the customer deposits into via `POST /bounties/{id}/fund`.

EarningStatus.description:
Earning lifecycle. `earned → released → paid` on the happy path,
`earned → clawed_back` otherwise.

EventMatch.description: Filter predicates evaluated against an `affiliate_events` row.

EventVerifierSpec.description: Event-driven verifier: matches rows landing in `affiliate_events`.

event_match.description:
Event-match filter. `event_type` is required; `attributes` is a list
of predicates AND-ed together.

LeaderboardEntry.description: Ranking entry for the global leaderboard.

expired_bounties.description: Bounties that expired past their deadline.

total_clawed_back_atomic.description: Total earnings that were clawed back.

total_earned_atomic.description: Total earning accruals, counted by status of `'earned' | 'released' | 'paid'`.

total_earners.description: Distinct users who have earned something in any bounty.

total_participants.description: Distinct users who have ever joined any bounty.

total_pool_remaining_atomic.description: Sum of remaining pool capacity across bounties that are still open.

additional_max_pool_atomic.description:
Additional atomic SerenBucks to add to the pool. Requires separate
escrow top-up via `POST /bounties/{id}/fund` to be credited.

items_path.description: JSON path into the response body that yields the iterable match set.

PollVerifierSpec.description:
Poll-driven verifier: calls a publisher every `cadence_seconds` and
evaluates a predicate over the response body.

attribution_rule.description: How to turn a matching response item into a bounty participant `user_id`.

cadence_seconds.description: Schedule cadence. Bounded to `[60, 86400]` seconds by validation.

predicate.description: Predicate evaluated against each item in the publisher response.

publisher.description: Seren publisher slug (validated against a supported-publisher list).

request_template.description:
HTTP request template. `{{cursor}}` is the only supported
interpolation for this service.

Tier.description:
A reward tier: when `cumulative_qualifying_count` crosses `threshold`, any
subsequent earnings accrue at `rate_atomic` (frozen at accrual time onto
`bounty_earnings.tier_rate_atomic`).

VerifierSpec.description:
The two verifier flavors. `event` is webhook-driven (affiliate_events);
`poll` calls a seren publisher on a cadence.
